message:
✨ Hybrid tile scaling + delta-clamped wheel throttle (#151)

Tile mode improvements:
- Normal buffer terminals: fitAddon.fit() for readable font + proper wrapping
- Alternate buffer terminals: CSS transform:scale() to preserve TUI content
- Detects buffer type via term.buffer.active.type per terminal

Scroll fix:
- Block ALL original wheel events on .xterm in capture phase
- Re-dispatch with deltaY clamped to ±50px (~3 lines max per event)
- Throttle at 120ms (~8 events/sec)
- Prevents macOS trackpad momentum 'rocket scroll'
- Synthetic events tracked via WeakSet to avoid self-interception

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
